'''''Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide'': Prima Official Game Guide''' was a strategy guide published by [[Prima Games]] for [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] and its expansions ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'', as well as the [[Star Wars Galaxies: Starter Kit|"New Game Enhancements"]] content.

{{Book-stub}}
